name: deconstruction
summary: Novel deconstruction and book breakdown module

commands.name: open
commands.summary: Print the deconstruction module discussion file path

commands.name: show
commands.summary: Display the deconstruction module discussion notes

commands.name: init
commands.summary: Create a complete deconstruction workspace for a book

args.name: book
args.summary: Path to collector book directory containing catalog.json and 章节/

args.name: --out
args.summary: Output workspace directory; defaults to novel-writing/deconstruction/<book-title>

args.name: --copy-chapters
args.summary: Copy original chapter files into workspace 01-原文/章节 instead of referencing collector path

args.name: --force
args.summary: Allow adding missing files/directories to an existing workspace directory
